GenAiPromptTemplate.description: Analyzes the bounded grounding context from NortAnalysisGroundingProvider for one runtime error and returns focused findings, the supportable cause, and suggested next items — a research step the diagnosis agent calls iteratively, not a final verdict.

templateDataProviders.description: Resolves requested code/metadata items (apex/flow/field/symboltable) into one bounded context for the analysis prompt template.
templateDataProviders.label: Nort: Build Analysis Grounding
